title: Help Desk Specialist I
notes: WMATA federal IT contract. 0-1yr exp acceptable. 24x7 Tier 1 support via phone/chat/email. No clearance required. CompTIA preferred but not required. Strong entry-level match.

title: Help Desk Specialist I
notes: 2nd NuAxis WMATA Help Desk Specialist I listing. Same federal IT contract, same strong entry-level fit. No clearance needed. Apply to both.

title: Associate Help Desk Analyst (Remote)
notes: US Treasury Salesforce platform support. 1+ yr exp required. Public Trust clearance needed. DC residents report onsite daily - fully remote if outside 50mi radius.

title: Associate Help Desk Analyst (Remote)
notes: Same ICF federal Salesforce HD role posted separately. Public Trust required. Apply to this one too for maximum exposure.

title: Remote Helpdesk Support Technician
notes: Remote help desk supporting 400+ auto dealerships. No clearance needed. Active Directory, hardware troubleshooting. Shift options 8am-5pm or 2pm-11pm EST.

title: IT Desktop / Helpdesk Support Specialist
notes: NIH/NIAID IT support contract. Hybrid schedule. Windows/Mac support, mobile devices, imaging. No clearance stated but federal client may require Public Trust.

title: Help Desk Technician
notes: 100% onsite 5 days/wk. Contract W2. Requires Bachelor's + 3yr exp. M365, hardware, SLA management. No clearance required.

title: Remote Helpdesk Support Technician
notes: Duplicate listing for Proton Dealership IT remote helpdesk. Same role, different posting. Apply to both for double exposure.

title: Technical Support Specialist
notes: Fully remote technical support. Strong $50-60/hr contract rate. Check clearance requirements when applying. Good opportunity to explore.

title: AV/VC Remote Support Technician L1
notes: Fully remote L1 AV/video conferencing support. Good entry-level IT opportunity in a growing space. Posted today - apply quickly.

title: Desktop Support Technician III
notes: Intune and BigFix experience preferred. Public Trust clearance required (obtainable). Security+ aligns with DoD cert requirements. Solid federal IT role.

title: IT Support Technician-3
notes: Public Trust clearance required (obtainable). Desktop IT support in DC. Security+ is a plus for DoD 8570 compliance.

title: Customer Support Specialist (Technical)
notes: SECRET clearance required - Peraton may sponsor. Technical customer support role. Security+ meets DoD 8570 IAT requirement. Sterling VA 30 min from DC.

title: Help Desk Technician I
notes: Active Secret or Interim Secret clearance required. Security+ CE (IAT Level II) required at hire - Jalen already has this. 1yr HD exp needed.

title: Mid-level Help Desk Support Technician
notes: Navy Yard DC. Req ID 40178. $38/hr solid pay. Likely needs DoD clearance. Security+ aligns with DoD 8570. Worth applying to show ceiling potential.

title: Help Desk / End User Support
notes: Onsite in Hampton VA. Entry-level end user support. Worth applying if open to Hampton Roads area.

title: Walkup Help Desk Desktop Specialist
notes: Walk-up IT support desk near Pentagon. SECRET clearance required. Security+ meets cert requirement. Competitive salary range.

title: Associate Help Desk Technician
notes: Active Top Secret required. Associate-level title fits experience. GDIT sometimes sponsors clearances. Apply to get into their system. All shifts available.

title: Junior Help Desk Technician
notes: Active Top Secret required. Junior title fits experience level. Submit to stay in GDIT talent pool for lower-clearance openings. All shifts available.

title: VIP Help Desk Analyst
notes: VIP executive IT support in Arlington. Federal contractor role likely needs clearance. High-visibility role accelerates career if cleared.

title: Help Desk Technician Mid-level
notes: Active Top Secret required. GDIT mid-level titles often reflect contract grade vs actual exp. Apply and highlight Security+ and Cloud+ certs.

title: Junior Helpdesk Specialist
notes: TS/SCI + CI Poly required. High clearance bar but strong title match. Apply anyway - Chenega may route strong candidates to lower-clearance contracts.

title: Enterprise Help Desk Agent, Tier 1
notes: US Air Force contract. TS/SCI required. Security+ CE satisfies DoD cert req. Keep on radar as Leidos reclassifies clearance levels as contracts evolve.

title: Help Desk Technician
notes: TS/SCI required in Chantilly VA. Apply anyway - GDIT maintains large talent pool and may match to future openings with lower clearance requirements.

title: Help Desk Technician - TS/SCI W/POLY
notes: TS/SCI with Full Scope Polygraph required. Annapolis MD location. Apply to get into GDIT system for lower-clearance openings in Maryland.
